seoTitle: Cliftleigh vs Clifton Grove — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cliftleigh and Clifton Grove. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cliftleigh vs Clifton Grove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cliftleigh and Clifton Grove.
heading: Cliftleigh vs Clifton Grove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cliftleigh, New South Wales and Clifton Grove, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clifton Grove has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Cliftleigh (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cliftleigh or Clifton Grove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cliftleigh has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Clifton Grove scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cliftleigh scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Clifton Grove scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cliftleigh or Clifton Grove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clifton Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
